alkylation reagent: Samples were treated with DTT and iodoacetamide to reduce and alkylate cysteine residues.
cleavage agent: the total trichome sample and 50 μg of the leaf samples were digested with trypsin.
collision energy: collecting MS spectra at a fragmentation energy of 70 eV.
fragmentation method: Data-dependent analysis was performed using a parallel HCD/CID fragmentation method.
instrument: data-dependent LC–MS/MS analysis on an Orbitrap-Fusion mass spectrometer.
ionization type: The column was connected to a 10-μm SilicaTip nanospray emitter.
labeling: Samples were treated with DTT and iodoacetamide to reduce and alkylate cysteine residues.
reduction reagent: Samples were treated with DTT and iodoacetamide to reduce and alkylate cysteine residues.
